detail.description:
Looking for a simple yet difficult puzzle game that will both help you relax AND train your brain? Color Slide - Hexa Puzzle is your one stop shop for all of that and more! As one of the most satisfying hexa games, it lets you enjoy relaxing sorting as you sort, slide and color match hexagons across the playing field, merging colors and making room for more pieces to appear. Just slide the pieces into place and enjoy this addictive color match puzzle as your stress slips away!

Hex-cellent Work
